response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-stack experience, but lacks explicit leadership experience in IT consulting, UML architecture modeling, and German language proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this executive-level role requiring client advisory and team leadership in a German-speaking context.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and environments
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic' — below required C1 level
No clear evidence of IT architecture design or UML modeling in client consulting context
Lacks documented experience managing teams or leading projects at executive level
